physical_tables.sql_compact: SELECT ORD_TOTAL.tr_date, /*ORD_TOTAL.s_year, ORD_TOTAL.s_month, DATE(CONCAT(s_year,'-',s_month,'-',s_day)) AS DT,*/ SUBSTRING(ORD_TOTAL.branch_id, 1, 3) AS group_code, ORD_TOTAL.branch_id, BR.branch_name, CONCAT(ORD_TOTAL.branch_id,' ',BR.branch_name) AS options, SUM(ORD_TOTAL.total) AS total, SUM(ORD_TOTAL.qty) AS qty /* , SUM(CATEGORY_OTHER.total) AS total_for_other, SUM(CATEGORY_OTHER.qty) AS qty_for_other, SUM(ORD_TOTAL.total-CATEGORY_OTHER.total) AS total_deduct, SUM(ORD_TOTAL.qty-CATEGORY_OTHER.qty) AS qty_deduct*/ FROM( SELECT tr_date, branch_id, branch, SUM(total) AS total, SUM(qty_subtotal) AS qty/*, s_year, s_month, s_day*/ FROM "50lan_new".orders_parquet WHERE status = 1 AND DATE(t_open_date) >= DATE('2024-01-01') GROUP BY tr_date,branch_id,branch/*,s_year,s_month,s_day*/ ORDER BY /*s_year,s_month,s_day,*/branch_id) AS ORD_TOTAL LEFT JOIN "50lan_new".branches AS BR ON BR.branch_id = ORD_TOTAL.branch_id GROUP BY ORD_TOTAL.branch_id, BR.branch_name, tr_date/*, ORD_TOTAL.s_year, ORD_TOTAL.s_month, ORD_TOTAL.s_day*/ ORDER BY branch_id, tr_date/*, s_year, s_month, s_day*/
physical_tables.sql:
SELECT ORD_TOTAL.tr_date,
/*ORD_TOTAL.s_year,
ORD_TOTAL.s_month,
DATE(CONCAT(s_year,'-',s_month,'-',s_day)) AS DT,*/
SUBSTRING(ORD_TOTAL.branch_id, 1, 3) AS group_code,
ORD_TOTAL.branch_id,
BR.branch_name,
CONCAT(ORD_TOTAL.branch_id,' ',BR.branch_name) AS options,
SUM(ORD_TOTAL.total) AS total,
SUM(ORD_TOTAL.qty) AS qty
/* ,
SUM(CATEGORY_OTHER.total) AS total_for_other,
SUM(CATEGORY_OTHER.qty) AS qty_for_other,
SUM(ORD_TOTAL.total-CATEGORY_OTHER.total) AS total_deduct,
SUM(ORD_TOTAL.qty-CATEGORY_OTHER.qty) AS qty_deduct*/
FROM(
    SELECT tr_date,
        branch_id,
        branch,
        SUM(total) AS total,
        SUM(qty_subtotal) AS qty/*,
        s_year,
        s_month,
        s_day*/
    FROM "50lan_new".orders_parquet
    WHERE status = 1 AND DATE(t_open_date) >= DATE('2024-01-01')
    GROUP BY tr_date,branch_id,branch/*,s_year,s_month,s_day*/
    ORDER BY /*s_year,s_month,s_day,*/branch_id) AS ORD_TOTAL
LEFT JOIN "50lan_new".branches AS BR ON BR.branch_id = ORD_TOTAL.branch_id
GROUP BY ORD_TOTAL.branch_id,
    BR.branch_name,
    tr_date/*,
    ORD_TOTAL.s_year,
    ORD_TOTAL.s_month,
    ORD_TOTAL.s_day*/
ORDER BY branch_id, tr_date/*, s_year, s_month, s_day*/

physical_tables.name: qty_total_by_branch
physical_tables.sql_compact: SELECT ORD_TOTAL.sale_period, SUBSTRING(ORD_TOTAL.branch_id, 1, 3) AS group_code, ORD_TOTAL.branch_id, BR.branch_name, CONCAT(ORD_TOTAL.branch_id,' ',BR.branch_name) AS options, SUM(ORD_TOTAL.total) AS total, SUM(ORD_TOTAL.qty) AS qty FROM( SELECT DATE(sale_period) AS sale_period, branch_id, branch, SUM(total) AS total, SUM(qty_subtotal) AS qty FROM "50lan_new".orders_parquet WHERE status = 1 AND DATE(sale_period) >= DATE('2024-01-01') GROUP BY sale_period, branch_id, branch ORDER BY branch_id) AS ORD_TOTAL LEFT JOIN "50lan_new".branches AS BR ON ORD_TOTAL.branch_id = BR.branch_id GROUP BY ORD_TOTAL.branch_id, BR.branch_name, sale_period ORDER BY branch_id, sale_period
physical_tables.sql:
SELECT ORD_TOTAL.sale_period,
SUBSTRING(ORD_TOTAL.branch_id, 1, 3) AS group_code,
ORD_TOTAL.branch_id,
BR.branch_name,
CONCAT(ORD_TOTAL.branch_id,' ',BR.branch_name) AS options,
SUM(ORD_TOTAL.total) AS total,
SUM(ORD_TOTAL.qty) AS qty
FROM(
    SELECT DATE(sale_period) AS sale_period,
        branch_id,
        branch,
        SUM(total) AS total,
        SUM(qty_subtotal) AS qty
    FROM "50lan_new".orders_parquet
    WHERE status = 1 AND DATE(sale_period) >= DATE('2024-01-01')
    GROUP BY sale_period,
        branch_id,
        branch
    ORDER BY branch_id) AS ORD_TOTAL
LEFT JOIN "50lan_new".branches AS BR ON ORD_TOTAL.branch_id = BR.branch_id
GROUP BY ORD_TOTAL.branch_id,
    BR.branch_name,
    sale_period
ORDER BY branch_id,
    sale_period

physical_tables.name: 50lan_new 所有 branches
physical_tables.sql_compact: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(b.group_code), ''), SUBSTRING(TRIM(b.branch_id), 1, 3)) AS group_code, TRIM(b.branch_id) AS branch_id, TRIM(b.branch_name) AS branch_name, CONCAT(TRIM(b.branch_id), ' ', TRIM(b.branch_name)) AS all_branches FROM "50lan_new".branches b WHERE b.status = 1 -- 如需顯示停用店，移除這行 ORDER BY branch_id
physical_tables.sql:
SELECT
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(b.group_code), ''), SUBSTRING(TRIM(b.branch_id), 1, 3)) AS group_code,
  TRIM(b.branch_id)   AS branch_id,
  TRIM(b.branch_name) AS branch_name,
  CONCAT(TRIM(b.branch_id), ' ', TRIM(b.branch_name)) AS all_branches
FROM "50lan_new".branches b
WHERE b.status = 1               -- 如需顯示停用店，移除這行
ORDER BY branch_id

physical_tables.name: 50lan_tw_產品銷售報表_產品類別_杯數_佔比by日_店家
physical_tables.sql_compact: SELECT ORD.t_open_date, ORD.tr_date, SUBSTRING(ORD.branch_id, 1, 3) AS group_code, BR.branch_name, ORD.branch_id, CONCAT(ORD.branch_id,' ',BR.branch_name) AS options, ITEM.cate_name, ITEM.product_name, SUM(ITEM.current_qty)AS qty_subtotal, SUM(ITEM.current_subtotal) AS current_subtotal FROM "50lan_new".orders_parquet AS ORD LEFT JOIN "50lan_new".order_items_parquet AS ITEM ON ORD.t_open_date = ITEM.t_open_date AND ORD.id = ITEM.order_id AND ORD.terminal_no = ITEM.terminal_no LEFT JOIN "50lan_new".branches AS BR ON BR.branch_id = ORD.branch_id WHERE ORD.status = 1 AND DATE(ORD.t_open_date) >= DATE('2024-01-01') GROUP BY ORD.t_open_date, ORD.tr_date, ORD.branch_id, BR.branch_name, ITEM.cate_name, ITEM.product_name ORDER BY ORD.t_open_date, ORD.tr_date, ORD.branch_id, BR.branch_name, ITEM.cate_name, ITEM.product_name
physical_tables.sql:
SELECT ORD.t_open_date,
    ORD.tr_date,
    SUBSTRING(ORD.branch_id, 1, 3) AS group_code,
    BR.branch_name,
    ORD.branch_id,
    CONCAT(ORD.branch_id,' ',BR.branch_name) AS options,
    ITEM.cate_name,
    ITEM.product_name,
    SUM(ITEM.current_qty)AS qty_subtotal,
    SUM(ITEM.current_subtotal) AS current_subtotal
FROM "50lan_new".orders_parquet AS ORD
LEFT JOIN "50lan_new".order_items_parquet AS ITEM
ON ORD.t_open_date = ITEM.t_open_date AND ORD.id = ITEM.order_id AND ORD.terminal_no = ITEM.terminal_no
LEFT JOIN "50lan_new".branches AS BR ON BR.branch_id = ORD.branch_id
WHERE ORD.status = 1 AND DATE(ORD.t_open_date) >= DATE('2024-01-01')
GROUP BY ORD.t_open_date,
    ORD.tr_date,
    ORD.branch_id,
    BR.branch_name,
    ITEM.cate_name,
    ITEM.product_name
ORDER BY ORD.t_open_date,
    ORD.tr_date,
    ORD.branch_id,
    BR.branch_name,
    ITEM.cate_name,
    ITEM.product_name

physical_tables.sql_compact: SELECT ORD.t_open_date, ORD.tr_date, SUBSTRING(ORD.branch_id, 1, 3) AS group_code, BR.branch_name, ORD.branch_id, CONCAT(ORD.branch_id,' ',BR.branch_name) AS options, ITEM.cate_name, ITEM.product_name, SUM(ITEM.current_qty)AS qty_subtotal, SUM(ITEM.current_subtotal) AS current_subtotal FROM "50lan".orders_parquet AS ORD LEFT JOIN "50lan".order_items_parquet AS ITEM ON ORD.t_open_date = ITEM.t_open_date AND ORD.id = ITEM.order_id LEFT JOIN "50lan".branches AS BR ON BR.branch_id= ORD.branch_id WHERE ORD.status = 1 AND ORD.t_open_date >= date('2021-01-01') AND ORD.branch_id LIKE 'TW%' GROUP BY ORD.t_open_date, ORD.tr_date, ORD.branch_id, BR.branch_name, ITEM.cate_name, ITEM.product_name ORDER BY ORD.t_open_date, ORD.tr_date, ORD.branch_id, BR.branch_name, ITEM.cate_name, ITEM.product_name
physical_tables.sql:
SELECT ORD.t_open_date,
    ORD.tr_date,
    SUBSTRING(ORD.branch_id, 1, 3) AS group_code,
    BR.branch_name,
    ORD.branch_id,
    CONCAT(ORD.branch_id,' ',BR.branch_name) AS options,
    ITEM.cate_name,
    ITEM.product_name,
    SUM(ITEM.current_qty)AS qty_subtotal,
    SUM(ITEM.current_subtotal) AS current_subtotal
FROM "50lan".orders_parquet AS ORD
LEFT JOIN "50lan".order_items_parquet AS ITEM
ON ORD.t_open_date = ITEM.t_open_date AND ORD.id = ITEM.order_id
LEFT JOIN "50lan".branches AS BR ON BR.branch_id= ORD.branch_id
WHERE ORD.status = 1 AND ORD.t_open_date >= date('2021-01-01') AND ORD.branch_id LIKE 'TW%'
GROUP BY ORD.t_open_date,
    ORD.tr_date,
    ORD.branch_id,
    BR.branch_name,
    ITEM.cate_name,
    ITEM.product_name
ORDER BY ORD.t_open_date,
    ORD.tr_date,
    ORD.branch_id,
    BR.branch_name,
    ITEM.cate_name,

physical_tables.name: report order payments prd
physical_tables.sql_compact: SELECT ORD.t_open_date, ORD.tr_date, SUBSTRING(ORD.branch_id, 1, 3) AS group_code, CONCAT(ORD.branch_id,' ',BR.branch_name) AS options, ORD.branch_id, BR.branch_name, PAYMENT.name, PAYMENT.memo1, SUM(PAYMENT.amount-PAYMENT.change) as amount FROM "50lan".orders_parquet AS ORD LEFT JOIN "50lan".order_payments_parquet AS PAYMENT ON ORD.t_open_date = PAYMENT.t_open_date AND ORD.id = PAYMENT.order_id LEFT JOIN "50lan".branches BR ON BR.branch_id = ORD.branch_id WHERE ORD.t_open_date >= DATE('2021-01-01') AND ORD.status = 1 AND ORD.branch_id LIKE 'TW%' GROUP BY ORD.t_open_date, ORD.tr_date, ORD.branch_id, BR.branch_name, PAYMENT.name, PAYMENT.memo1 ORDER BY ORD.t_open_date, ORD.tr_date, ORD.branch_id, BR.branch_name, PAYMENT.name, PAYMENT.memo1
physical_tables.sql:
SELECT ORD.t_open_date,
ORD.tr_date,
SUBSTRING(ORD.branch_id, 1, 3) AS group_code,
CONCAT(ORD.branch_id,' ',BR.branch_name) AS options,
ORD.branch_id,
BR.branch_name,
PAYMENT.name,
PAYMENT.memo1,
SUM(PAYMENT.amount-PAYMENT.change) as amount
FROM "50lan".orders_parquet AS ORD
LEFT JOIN "50lan".order_payments_parquet AS PAYMENT ON ORD.t_open_date = PAYMENT.t_open_date AND ORD.id = PAYMENT.order_id
LEFT JOIN "50lan".branches BR ON BR.branch_id = ORD.branch_id
WHERE ORD.t_open_date >= DATE('2021-01-01') AND ORD.status = 1 AND ORD.branch_id LIKE 'TW%'
GROUP BY ORD.t_open_date,
    ORD.tr_date,
    ORD.branch_id,
    BR.branch_name,
    PAYMENT.name,
    PAYMENT.memo1
ORDER BY ORD.t_open_date,
    ORD.tr_date,
    ORD.branch_id,
    BR.branch_name,
    PAYMENT.name,
    PAYMENT.memo1

physical_tables.name: 50lan_tw_作廢統計
physical_tables.sql_compact: SELECT SUBSTRING(ORD.branch_id, 1, 3) AS group_code, BR.branch_name, ORD.branch_id, CONCAT(ORD.branch_id,' ',BR.branch_name) AS options, sale_period, SUM(sale_total+current_void_total+diff_void_total) AS total, SUM(sale_num+current_void_num+diff_void_num) AS num, SUM(sale_num) AS current_num, SUM(sale_total) AS current_total, SUM(current_void_num) AS current_void_num, SUM(current_void_total) AS current_void_total, SUM(diff_void_num) AS diff_void_num, SUM(diff_void_total) AS diff_void_total FROM ( SELECT branch_id, sale_period, COALESCE(CASE WHEN status=1 THEN COUNT(ord_id) END, 0) AS sale_num, COALESCE(CASE WHEN status=1 THEN SUM(total) END, 0) AS sale_total, COALESCE(CASE WHEN status=-2 AND void_sale_period=FORMAT('%s', sale_period) THEN COUNT(ord_id) END, 0) AS current_void_num, COALESCE(CASE WHEN status=-2 AND void_sale_period=FORMAT('%s', sale_period) THEN SUM(total) END, 0) AS current_void_total, COALESCE(CASE WHEN status=-2 AND void_sale_period!=FORMAT('%s', sale_period) THEN COUNT(ord_id) END, 0) AS diff_void_num, COALESCE(CASE WHEN status=-2 AND void_sale_period!=FORMAT('%s', sale_period) THEN SUM(total) END, 0) AS diff_void_total FROM ( SELECT branch_id, sale_period, id AS ord_id, total, void_sale_period, status FROM "50lan_new"."orders_parquet" WHERE DATE(sale_period) >= DATE('2024-01-01') AND status=-2 OR status=1 ) GROUP BY branch_id, sale_period, status, void_sale_period ) AS ORD LEFT JOIN "50lan_new".branches AS BR ON BR.branch_id = ORD.branch_id WHERE (DATE(ORD.sale_period) < DATE('2024-01-01') AND diff_void_total > 0) OR DATE(ORD.sale_period) >= DATE('2024-01-01') GROUP BY BR.branch_name, ORD.sale_period, ORD.branch_id ORDER BY ORD.sale_period, ORD.branch_id
physical_tables.sql:
SELECT SUBSTRING(ORD.branch_id, 1, 3) AS group_code,
        BR.branch_name,
        ORD.branch_id,
        CONCAT(ORD.branch_id,' ',BR.branch_name) AS options,
        sale_period,
        SUM(sale_total+current_void_total+diff_void_total) AS total,
        SUM(sale_num+current_void_num+diff_void_num) AS num,
        SUM(sale_num) AS current_num,
        SUM(sale_total) AS current_total,
        SUM(current_void_num) AS current_void_num,
        SUM(current_void_total) AS current_void_total,
        SUM(diff_void_num) AS diff_void_num,
        SUM(diff_void_total) AS diff_void_total
FROM (
    SELECT branch_id,
        sale_period,
        COALESCE(CASE WHEN status=1 THEN COUNT(ord_id) END, 0) AS sale_num,
        COALESCE(CASE WHEN status=1 THEN SUM(total) END, 0) AS sale_total,
        COALESCE(CASE WHEN status=-2 AND void_sale_period=FORMAT('%s', sale_period) THEN COUNT(ord_id) END, 0) AS current_void_num,
        COALESCE(CASE WHEN status=-2 AND void_sale_period=FORMAT('%s', sale_period) THEN SUM(total) END, 0) AS current_void_total,
        COALESCE(CASE WHEN status=-2 AND void_sale_period!=FORMAT('%s', sale_period) THEN COUNT(ord_id) END, 0) AS diff_void_num,
        COALESCE(CASE WHEN status=-2 AND void_sale_period!=FORMAT('%s', sale_period) THEN SUM(total) END, 0) AS diff_void_total
    FROM (
        SELECT branch_id,
            sale_period,
            id AS ord_id,
            total,
            void_sale_period,
            status
        FROM "50lan_new"."orders_parquet"
        WHERE DATE(sale_period) >= DATE('2024-01-01') AND status=-2 OR status=1
    )
    GROUP BY branch_id,
        sale_period,
        status,
        void_sale_period
) AS ORD
LEFT JOIN "50lan_new".branches AS BR ON BR.branch_id = ORD.branch_id
WHERE (DATE(ORD.sale_period) < DATE('2024-01-01') AND diff_void_total > 0) OR DATE(ORD.sale_period) >= DATE('2024-01-01')
GROUP BY BR.branch_name,
        ORD.sale_period,
        ORD.branch_id
ORDER BY ORD.sale_period,
    ORD.branch_id

physical_tables.sql_compact: SELECT FULL_TB.tr_date, SUBSTRING(FULL_TB.branch_id, 1, 3) AS group_code, FULL_TB.branch_id, BR.branch_name, CONCAT(FULL_TB.branch_id,' ',BR.branch_name) AS options, FULL_TB.destination, SUM(FULL_TB.total) AS total, SUM(FULL_TB.qty) AS qty, COUNT(FULL_TB.ord_id) AS order_num, SUM(FULL_TB.total_for_other) AS total_for_other, SUM(FULL_TB.qty_for_other) AS qty_for_other, SUM(FULL_TB.total_deduct) AS total_deduct, SUM(FULL_TB.qty_deduct) AS qty_deduct FROM ( SELECT ORD_TOTAL.tr_date, ORD_TOTAL.branch_id, ORD_TOTAL.branch, CONCAT(ORD_TOTAL.branch_id,' ',ORD_TOTAL.branch) AS options, ORD_TOTAL.destination, ORD_TOTAL.total AS total, ORD_TOTAL.qty AS qty, ORD_TOTAL.id AS ord_id, COALESCE(CATEGORY_OTHER.other_total,0) AS total_for_other, COALESCE(CATEGORY_OTHER.other_qty,0) AS qty_for_other, ORD_TOTAL.total-COALESCE(CATEGORY_OTHER.other_total,0) AS total_deduct, ORD_TOTAL.qty-COALESCE(CATEGORY_OTHER.other_qty,0) AS qty_deduct FROM( SELECT DISTINCT tr_date, id, branch_id, branch, destination, total AS total, qty_subtotal AS qty FROM "50lan".orders_parquet WHERE branch_id LIKE 'TW%' AND t_open_date >= DATE('2021-01-01') AND status = 1 ) AS ORD_TOTAL LEFT JOIN ( SELECT tr_date, ord_id, branch_id, destination, SUM(current_subtotal) AS other_total, SUM(current_qty) AS other_qty FROM( SELECT DISTINCT ORD.tr_date, ORD.id AS ord_id, ORD.branch_id, ORD.destination, ITEMS.id, ITEMS.current_subtotal, ITEMS.current_qty FROM "50lan".orders_parquet AS ORD LEFT JOIN "50lan".order_items_parquet AS ITEMS ON ITEMS.order_id = ORD.id WHERE ORD.t_open_date >= DATE('2021-01-01') AND ORD.status = 1 AND ITEMS.cate_no='1000' ) GROUP BY tr_date, ord_id, branch_id, destination) AS CATEGORY_OTHER ON CATEGORY_OTHER.branch_id = ORD_TOTAL.branch_id AND CATEGORY_OTHER.tr_date = ORD_TOTAL.tr_date AND CATEGORY_OTHER.destination = ORD_TOTAL.destination AND CATEGORY_OTHER.ord_id = ORD_TOTAL.id) AS FULL_TB LEFT JOIN "50lan".branches AS BR ON BR.branch_id = FULL_TB.branch_id GROUP BY FULL_TB.tr_date, FULL_TB.branch_id, BR.branch_name, FULL_TB.destination
physical_tables.sql:
SELECT FULL_TB.tr_date,
SUBSTRING(FULL_TB.branch_id, 1, 3) AS group_code,
FULL_TB.branch_id,
BR.branch_name,
CONCAT(FULL_TB.branch_id,' ',BR.branch_name) AS options,
FULL_TB.destination,
SUM(FULL_TB.total) AS total,
SUM(FULL_TB.qty) AS qty,
COUNT(FULL_TB.ord_id) AS order_num,
SUM(FULL_TB.total_for_other) AS total_for_other,
SUM(FULL_TB.qty_for_other) AS qty_for_other,
SUM(FULL_TB.total_deduct) AS total_deduct,
SUM(FULL_TB.qty_deduct) AS qty_deduct
FROM (
    SELECT ORD_TOTAL.tr_date,
    ORD_TOTAL.branch_id,
    ORD_TOTAL.branch,
    CONCAT(ORD_TOTAL.branch_id,' ',ORD_TOTAL.branch) AS options,
    ORD_TOTAL.destination,
    ORD_TOTAL.total AS total,
    ORD_TOTAL.qty AS qty,
    ORD_TOTAL.id AS ord_id,
    COALESCE(CATEGORY_OTHER.other_total,0) AS total_for_other,
    COALESCE(CATEGORY_OTHER.other_qty,0) AS qty_for_other,
    ORD_TOTAL.total-COALESCE(CATEGORY_OTHER.other_total,0) AS total_deduct,
    ORD_TOTAL.qty-COALESCE(CATEGORY_OTHER.other_qty,0) AS qty_deduct
    FROM(
        SELECT DISTINCT tr_date,
            id,
            branch_id,
            branch,
            destination,
            total AS total,
            qty_subtotal AS qty
        FROM "50lan".orders_parquet
        WHERE branch_id LIKE 'TW%' AND t_open_date >= DATE('2021-01-01') AND status = 1
        ) AS ORD_TOTAL
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT tr_date,
            ord_id,
            branch_id,
            destination,
            SUM(current_subtotal) AS other_total,
            SUM(current_qty) AS other_qty
        FROM(
            SELECT DISTINCT ORD.tr_date,
                ORD.id AS ord_id,
                ORD.branch_id,
                ORD.destination,
                ITEMS.id,
                ITEMS.current_subtotal,
                ITEMS.current_qty
            FROM "50lan".orders_parquet AS ORD
            LEFT JOIN "50lan".order_items_parquet AS ITEMS ON ITEMS.order_id = ORD.id
            WHERE ORD.t_open_date >= DATE('2021-01-01') AND ORD.status = 1 AND ITEMS.cate_no='1000'
        )
        GROUP BY tr_date,
        ord_id,
        branch_id,
        destination) AS CATEGORY_OTHER
    ON CATEGORY_OTHER.branch_id = ORD_TOTAL.branch_id AND CATEGORY_OTHER.tr_date = ORD_TOTAL.tr_date
    AND CATEGORY_OTHER.destination = ORD_TOTAL.destination AND CATEGORY_OTHER.ord_id = ORD_TOTAL.id) AS FULL_TB
LEFT JOIN "50lan".branches AS BR ON BR.branch_id = FULL_TB.branch_id
GROUP BY FULL_TB.tr_date,
    FULL_TB.branch_id,
    BR.branch_name,
    FULL_TB.destination

physical_tables.name: qty_total_by_branch
physical_tables.sql_compact: SELECT ORD_TOTAL.s_year, ORD_TOTAL.s_month, DATE(CONCAT(s_year,'-',s_month,'-01')) AS DT, SUBSTRING(ORD_TOTAL.branch_id, 1, 3) AS group_code, ORD_TOTAL.branch_id, BR.branch_name, CONCAT(ORD_TOTAL.branch_id,' ',BR.branch_name) AS options, SUM(ORD_TOTAL.total) AS total, SUM(ORD_TOTAL.qty) AS qty, SUM(CATEGORY_OTHER.total) AS total_for_other, SUM(CATEGORY_OTHER.qty) AS qty_for_other, SUM(ORD_TOTAL.total-CATEGORY_OTHER.total) AS total_deduct, SUM(ORD_TOTAL.qty-CATEGORY_OTHER.qty) AS qty_deduct FROM( SELECT tr_date, branch_id, -- branch, SUM(total) AS total, SUM(qty_subtotal) AS qty, s_year, s_month FROM "50lan_new".orders_parquet AS ORD WHERE status = 1 AND DATE(ORD.sale_period) >= DATE('2024-01-01') GROUP BY tr_date,branch_id,branch,s_year,s_month ORDER BY s_year,s_month,branch_id) AS ORD_TOTAL LEFT JOIN ( SELECT tr_date, branch_id, SUM(total) AS total, SUM(qty) AS qty FROM( SELECT DISTINCT ITEMS.id, ORD.tr_date, ORD.branch_id, ITEMS.current_subtotal AS total, ITEMS.current_qty AS qty FROM "50lan_new".orders_parquet AS ORD LEFT JOIN "50lan_new".order_items_parquet AS ITEMS ON ITEMS.order_id = ORD.id AND ITEMS.terminal_no = ORD.terminal_no WHERE ORD.status = 1 AND ITEMS.cate_no='1000' ) GROUP BY tr_date,branch_id ORDER BY tr_date,branch_id) AS CATEGORY_OTHER ON CATEGORY_OTHER.branch_id = ORD_TOTAL.branch_id AND CATEGORY_OTHER.tr_date = ORD_TOTAL.tr_date LEFT JOIN "50lan_new".branches AS BR ON ORD_TOTAL.branch_id = BR.branch_id GROUP BY ORD_TOTAL.branch_id, BR.branch_name, ORD_TOTAL.s_year, ORD_TOTAL.s_month ORDER BY branch_id, s_year DESC, s_month DESC
physical_tables.sql:
SELECT
    ORD_TOTAL.s_year,
    ORD_TOTAL.s_month,
    DATE(CONCAT(s_year,'-',s_month,'-01')) AS DT,
    SUBSTRING(ORD_TOTAL.branch_id, 1, 3) AS group_code,
    ORD_TOTAL.branch_id,
    BR.branch_name,
    CONCAT(ORD_TOTAL.branch_id,' ',BR.branch_name) AS options,
    SUM(ORD_TOTAL.total) AS total,
    SUM(ORD_TOTAL.qty) AS qty,
    SUM(CATEGORY_OTHER.total) AS total_for_other,
    SUM(CATEGORY_OTHER.qty) AS qty_for_other,
    SUM(ORD_TOTAL.total-CATEGORY_OTHER.total) AS total_deduct,
    SUM(ORD_TOTAL.qty-CATEGORY_OTHER.qty) AS qty_deduct
FROM(
    SELECT tr_date,
        branch_id,
        -- branch,
        SUM(total) AS total,
        SUM(qty_subtotal) AS qty,
        s_year,
        s_month
    FROM "50lan_new".orders_parquet AS ORD
    WHERE status = 1 AND DATE(ORD.sale_period) >= DATE('2024-01-01')
    GROUP BY tr_date,branch_id,branch,s_year,s_month
    ORDER BY s_year,s_month,branch_id) AS ORD_TOTAL
LEFT JOIN 
(
    SELECT tr_date,
        branch_id,
        SUM(total) AS total,
        SUM(qty) AS qty
    FROM(
        SELECT DISTINCT ITEMS.id,
            ORD.tr_date,
            ORD.branch_id,
            ITEMS.current_subtotal AS total,
            ITEMS.current_qty AS qty
        FROM "50lan_new".orders_parquet AS ORD
        LEFT JOIN "50lan_new".order_items_parquet AS ITEMS ON ITEMS.order_id = ORD.id AND ITEMS.terminal_no = ORD.terminal_no
        WHERE ORD.status = 1 AND ITEMS.cate_no='1000'
    )
    GROUP BY tr_date,branch_id
    ORDER BY tr_date,branch_id) AS CATEGORY_OTHER
ON CATEGORY_OTHER.branch_id = ORD_TOTAL.branch_id AND CATEGORY_OTHER.tr_date = ORD_TOTAL.tr_date
LEFT JOIN "50lan_new".branches AS BR ON ORD_TOTAL.branch_id = BR.branch_id
GROUP BY ORD_TOTAL.branch_id,
    BR.branch_name,
    ORD_TOTAL.s_year,
    ORD_TOTAL.s_month
ORDER BY branch_id, s_year DESC, s_month DESC

physical_tables.name: qty_total_by_branch
physical_tables.sql_compact: SELECT ORD_TOTAL.s_year, ORD_TOTAL.s_month, DATE(CONCAT(s_year,'-',s_month,'-01')) AS DT, SUBSTRING(ORD_TOTAL.branch_id, 1, 3) AS group_code, ORD_TOTAL.branch_id, -- 這裡把 branch 改成最新名稱 BR_MAP.latest_branch AS branch, -- options 也改用最新名稱 CONCAT(ORD_TOTAL.branch_id,' ', BR_MAP.latest_branch) AS options, SUM(ORD_TOTAL.total) AS total, SUM(ORD_TOTAL.qty) AS qty, SUM(CATEGORY_OTHER.total) AS total_for_other, SUM(CATEGORY_OTHER.qty) AS qty_for_other, SUM(ORD_TOTAL.total - CATEGORY_OTHER.total) AS total_deduct, SUM(ORD_TOTAL.qty - CATEGORY_OTHER.qty) AS qty_deduct FROM ( SELECT tr_date, branch_id, branch, SUM(total) AS total, SUM(qty_subtotal) AS qty, s_year, s_month FROM "50lan".orders_parquet WHERE branch_id LIKE 'TW%' AND t_open_date >= DATE('2021-01-01') AND status = 1 GROUP BY tr_date, branch_id, branch, s_year, s_month ) AS ORD_TOTAL -- 取得每個 branch_id 最新那筆的 branch 名稱 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT branch_id, branch AS latest_branch FROM ( SELECT branch_id, branch, tr_date, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY branch_id ORDER BY tr_date DESC ) AS rn FROM "50lan".orders_parquet WHERE branch_id LIKE 'TW%' AND t_open_date >= DATE('2021-01-01') AND status = 1 ) AS ranked WHERE rn = 1 ) AS BR_MAP ON BR_MAP.branch_id = ORD_TOTAL.branch_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT tr_date, branch_id, SUM(total) AS total, SUM(qty) AS qty FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT ITEMS.id, ORD.tr_date, ORD.branch_id, ITEMS.current_subtotal AS total, ITEMS.current_qty AS qty FROM "50lan".orders_parquet AS ORD LEFT JOIN "50lan".order_items_parquet AS ITEMS ON ITEMS.order_id = ORD.id WHERE ORD.tr_date >= DATE('2021-01-01') AND ORD.status = 1 AND ITEMS.cate_no = '1000' ) AS sub GROUP BY tr_date, branch_id ) AS CATEGORY_OTHER ON CATEGORY_OTHER.branch_id = ORD_TOTAL.branch_id AND CATEGORY_OTHER.tr_date = ORD_TOTAL.tr_date GROUP BY ORD_TOTAL.branch_id, BR_MAP.latest_branch, ORD_TOTAL.s_year, ORD_TOTAL.s_month ORDER BY branch_id, s_year DESC, s_month DESC
physical_tables.sql:
SELECT
    ORD_TOTAL.s_year,
    ORD_TOTAL.s_month,
    DATE(CONCAT(s_year,'-',s_month,'-01'))               AS DT,
    SUBSTRING(ORD_TOTAL.branch_id, 1, 3)                AS group_code,
    ORD_TOTAL.branch_id,
    -- 這裡把 branch 改成最新名稱
    BR_MAP.latest_branch                                 AS branch,
    -- options 也改用最新名稱
    CONCAT(ORD_TOTAL.branch_id,' ', BR_MAP.latest_branch) AS options,
    SUM(ORD_TOTAL.total)       AS total,
    SUM(ORD_TOTAL.qty)         AS qty,
    SUM(CATEGORY_OTHER.total)  AS total_for_other,
    SUM(CATEGORY_OTHER.qty)    AS qty_for_other,
    SUM(ORD_TOTAL.total - CATEGORY_OTHER.total) AS total_deduct,
    SUM(ORD_TOTAL.qty   - CATEGORY_OTHER.qty)   AS qty_deduct
FROM (
    SELECT 
        tr_date,
        branch_id,
        branch,
        SUM(total)         AS total,
        SUM(qty_subtotal)  AS qty,
        s_year,
        s_month
    FROM "50lan".orders_parquet
    WHERE branch_id LIKE 'TW%'
      AND t_open_date  >= DATE('2021-01-01')
      AND status       = 1
    GROUP BY tr_date, branch_id, branch, s_year, s_month
) AS ORD_TOTAL

-- 取得每個 branch_id 最新那筆的 branch 名稱
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT branch_id, branch AS latest_branch
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            branch_id,
            branch,
            tr_date,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
              PARTITION BY branch_id
              ORDER BY tr_date DESC
            ) AS rn
        FROM "50lan".orders_parquet
        WHERE branch_id LIKE 'TW%'
          AND t_open_date >= DATE('2021-01-01')
          AND status      = 1
    ) AS ranked
    WHERE rn = 1
) AS BR_MAP
  ON BR_MAP.branch_id = ORD_TOTAL.branch_id

LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT 
        tr_date,
        branch_id,
        SUM(total) AS total,
        SUM(qty)   AS qty
    FROM (
        SELECT DISTINCT
            ITEMS.id,
            ORD.tr_date,
            ORD.branch_id,
            ITEMS.current_subtotal AS total,
            ITEMS.current_qty      AS qty
        FROM "50lan".orders_parquet AS ORD
        LEFT JOIN "50lan".order_items_parquet AS ITEMS
          ON ITEMS.order_id  = ORD.id
        WHERE ORD.tr_date     >= DATE('2021-01-01')
          AND ORD.status      = 1
          AND ITEMS.cate_no   = '1000'
    ) AS sub
    GROUP BY tr_date, branch_id
) AS CATEGORY_OTHER
  ON CATEGORY_OTHER.branch_id = ORD_TOTAL.branch_id
 AND CATEGORY_OTHER.tr_date    = ORD_TOTAL.tr_date

GROUP BY 
    ORD_TOTAL.branch_id,
    BR_MAP.latest_branch,
    ORD_TOTAL.s_year,
    ORD_TOTAL.s_month

ORDER BY 
    branch_id,
    s_year DESC,
    s_month DESC

physical_tables.sql_compact: SELECT BR.tw_city, BOSD.branch_id, BR.branch_name, CONCAT(BOSD.branch_id, ' ', BR.branch_name) AS options, BOSD.sale_period, BOSD.terminal_no, DATE_FORMAT(BR.open_begin_time, '%H:%i:%s') AS open_time, BOSD.first_time, BOSD.first_qty_all, BOSD.first_other_qty, BOSD.first_total, BOSD.last_time, BOSD.last_qty_all, BOSD.last_other_qty, BOSD.last_total, DATE_FORMAT(BR.open_end_time, '%H:%i:%s') AS close_time FROM "50lan"."branch_opening_status_daily" AS BOSD LEFT JOIN "50lan"."branches" AS BR ON BOSD.branch_id = BR.branch_id WHERE BOSD.branch_id LIKE 'TWD%'
physical_tables.sql:
SELECT
    BR.tw_city,
    BOSD.branch_id,
    BR.branch_name,
    CONCAT(BOSD.branch_id, ' ', BR.branch_name) AS options,
    BOSD.sale_period,
    BOSD.terminal_no,
    DATE_FORMAT(BR.open_begin_time, '%H:%i:%s') AS open_time,
    BOSD.first_time,
    BOSD.first_qty_all,
    BOSD.first_other_qty,
    BOSD.first_total,
    BOSD.last_time,
    BOSD.last_qty_all,
    BOSD.last_other_qty,
    BOSD.last_total,
    DATE_FORMAT(BR.open_end_time, '%H:%i:%s') AS close_time
FROM "50lan"."branch_opening_status_daily" AS BOSD
LEFT JOIN "50lan"."branches" AS BR
    ON BOSD.branch_id = BR.branch_id
WHERE BOSD.branch_id LIKE 'TWD%'

physical_tables.name: 50lan_branch_opening_status_daily
physical_tables.sql_compact: SELECT BR.tw_city, BOSD.branch_id, BR.branch_name, CONCAT(BOSD.branch_id, ' ', BR.branch_name) AS options, BOSD.sale_period, BOSD.terminal_no, DATE_FORMAT(BR.open_begin_time, '%H:%i:%s') AS open_time, BOSD.first_time, BOSD.first_qty_all, BOSD.first_other_qty, BOSD.first_total, BOSD.last_time, BOSD.last_qty_all, BOSD.last_other_qty, BOSD.last_total, DATE_FORMAT(BR.open_end_time, '%H:%i:%s') AS close_time FROM "50lan_new"."branch_opening_status_daily" AS BOSD LEFT JOIN "50lan_new"."branches" AS BR ON BOSD.branch_id = BR.branch_id WHERE DATE(BOSD.sale_period) >= DATE('2024-01-01') AND BOSD.branch_id LIKE 'TWD%'
physical_tables.sql:
SELECT
    BR.tw_city,
    BOSD.branch_id,
    BR.branch_name,
    CONCAT(BOSD.branch_id, ' ', BR.branch_name) AS options,
    BOSD.sale_period,
    BOSD.terminal_no,
    DATE_FORMAT(BR.open_begin_time, '%H:%i:%s') AS open_time,
    BOSD.first_time,
    BOSD.first_qty_all,
    BOSD.first_other_qty,
    BOSD.first_total,
    BOSD.last_time,
    BOSD.last_qty_all,
    BOSD.last_other_qty,
    BOSD.last_total,
    DATE_FORMAT(BR.open_end_time, '%H:%i:%s') AS close_time
FROM "50lan_new"."branch_opening_status_daily" AS BOSD
LEFT JOIN "50lan_new"."branches" AS BR
    ON BOSD.branch_id = BR.branch_id
WHERE DATE(BOSD.sale_period) >= DATE('2024-01-01')
  AND BOSD.branch_id LIKE 'TWD%'

physical_tables.name: 50lan_new 所有 branches
physical_tables.sql_compact: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(b.group_code), ''), SUBSTRING(TRIM(b.branch_id), 1, 3)) AS group_code, TRIM(b.branch_id) AS branch_id, TRIM(b.branch_name) AS branch_name, CONCAT(TRIM(b.branch_id), ' ', TRIM(b.branch_name)) AS all_branches FROM "50lan_new".branches b WHERE b.status = 1 -- 如需顯示停用店，移除這行 ORDER BY branch_id
physical_tables.sql:
SELECT
  COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(b.group_code), ''), SUBSTRING(TRIM(b.branch_id), 1, 3)) AS group_code,
  TRIM(b.branch_id)   AS branch_id,
  TRIM(b.branch_name) AS branch_name,
  CONCAT(TRIM(b.branch_id), ' ', TRIM(b.branch_name)) AS all_branches
FROM "50lan_new".branches b
WHERE b.status = 1               -- 如需顯示停用店，移除這行
ORDER BY branch_id
